nl: For any move m, isHorizontal m is true exactly when isVertical m is false.
context:
set_option autoImplicit false

inductive Move : Type
| L
| R
| U
| D
deriving DecidableEq

def isHorizontal : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| _ => false

def isVertical : Move → Bool
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
| _ => false

def isAxis : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
expected: ∀ m : Move, isHorizontal m = (! isVertical m)

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any move m, isVertical m is true exactly when isHorizontal m is false.

nl: In the four-element type Basis, the complement of {e1, e2} is {e3, e4}.
context:
set_option autoImplicit false

inductive Basis : Type
| e1
| e2
| e3
| e4
deriving DecidableEq

def swap12 : Basis → Basis
| Basis.e1 => Basis.e2
| Basis.e2 => Basis.e1
| b => b

def FixedPoints (f : Basis → Basis) : Set Basis := {b | f b = b}
expected: (((Set.singleton Basis.e1 ∪ Set.singleton Basis.e2) : Set Basis)ᶜ) = ((Set.singleton Basis.e3 ∪ Set.singleton Basis.e4) : Set Basis)

provenance.notes: Graduate-level-flavored set equalities over finite carriers; designed for deterministic extensional checking.

def FixedPoints (f : Basis → Basis) : Set Basis := {b | f b = b}

nl: For swap12 on Basis, fixed points together with non-fixed points give the universal set.
context:

inductive Basis : Type

def swap12 : Basis → Basis
